channel.title: UPSSSC on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in UPSSSC on Gajab Jobs

item.title: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 2759 vacancies for the post of Technical Assistant (Agriculture). Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture and a valid PET 2025 score to apply. The application process starts from 22 May 2026 and ends on 11 June 2026. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories. The selection process includes shortlisting based on PET, a written examination, and document verification. Both male and female candidates are eligible to apply.
